content.speakerText: I've already updated the project tracker and briefed Sarah on my tasks.
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经更新了项目进度表，并跟莎拉交代了手头工作。

options.text: That's fantastic! You're always so organized.
Why didn't you wait for me to review it first?
Can you just send me the file instead?
I hope you didn't forget the budget report.

content.explanation: 正确答案是对主动准备的积极肯定，符合职场专业语境。干扰项中，第二个质疑对方未等审批，语气不妥；第三个要求直接发文件，忽略了对方已完成沟通；第四个暗示疏漏，与正面反馈语境冲突。

content.speakerText: I'll be available by email for anything critical.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果有紧急事，我随时在线回复邮件。

options.text: Thanks for offering — but please don’t feel pressured to respond outside your time off.
Great, I’ll email you every hour just in case.
Actually, I need you to check emails every day.
Can you also answer calls on weekends?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现关怀与边界意识，符合‘休息优先’的使用说明。干扰项中，第二个过度打扰，第三个违背原意，第四个扩大责任范围，均与鼓励休息的语境冲突。

content.speakerText: I’ve prepared a detailed handover document and scheduled a 30-minute meeting with the team tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 我准备了一份详细的交接文档，并安排了明天与团队30分钟的会议。

options.text: You're going above and beyond — this level of preparation is exactly what we need.
Do you think you're overcomplicating things?
Can you just send the document and skip the meeting?
I didn't ask you to do all this — it's not your responsibility.

content.explanation: 正确答案高度认可主动性和专业性，契合‘减轻经理负担’的场景目标。干扰项中，第二个质疑过度准备，否定积极行为；第三个简化流程，忽略沟通价值；第四个否定责任，语气消极，均不符合职场正向反馈原则。

content.template: I've updated the project tracker and ___ Sarah on my tasks.
content.hint: 在职场交接中，正式表达‘交代任务’的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 职场高频动词搭配（brief someone on tasks）

content.template: I'll be available by email for ___ critical issues.
content.hint: 表达‘任何紧急事项’的最自然、最常用表达

content.template: I’ve prepared a handover document so you can ___ focus on other priorities.
content.hint: 表达‘让你能专注于其他事务’的核心句型
content.knowledgePoint: 目的表达（so you can + 动词）

content.speakerText: I've already updated the project tracker and briefed Sarah on my tasks.
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经更新了项目进度表，并跟莎拉交代了手头工作。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for being proactive. Is there anything urgent I should prepare for?
Great job — just keep me updated if anything changes.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达认可与支持
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用场景关键词（e.g., proactive, updated, briefed）
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者口语习惯，避免生硬或书面化表达
关键词覆盖：是否至少使用一个场景高频词（如proactive, lifesaver, keep me posted）

content.speakerText: I'll be available by email for anything critical.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果有紧急事，我随时在线回复邮件。
expectedAnswers: Perfect. Don't overdo it though — rest up!
Thanks for being reachable, but please don't feel obligated to check emails during your time off.
Got it. We'll handle anything urgent — you deserve a break.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否体现关怀、鼓励休息，而非利用对方
语言准确性：是否正确使用情态动词（don't, shouldn't）和语气词（though, though）
表达自然度：是否避免命令式或冷漠语气，使用温暖、支持性表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用场景关键词（critical, rest up, overdo it）

content.speakerText: I've scheduled a handover meeting and sent everyone the documents ahead of time.
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经安排了交接会议，并提前发送了所有文档。
expectedAnswers: That's incredibly thoughtful — you’ve made this so smooth for everyone.
You’re really taking ownership of this transition. I appreciate it.
Perfect planning! This level of preparation really reduces stress for the team.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达赞赏与认可对方的主动性
语言准确性：语法结构完整，动词时态和搭配正确（e.g., taking ownership, reduces stress）
表达自然度：是否使用地道职场表达（e.g., incredibly thoughtful, made this smooth）
关键词覆盖：是否使用场景关键词（handover, preparation, reduce stress, ownership）
